task_objective: Fix strict review findings on the UI responsiveness implementation branch.
design_decisions: Treat Ludusavi discovery not-found as a successful null command while preserving RpcStatus for unexpected discovery failures.
Defer service lookup into worker-thread callbacks for newly wrapped RPCs.
Gate warmed background refreshes without showing the Loading game list status.
Apply backend-sanitized selected game values after settings persistence succeeds.
Abort Ludusavi launch when shortcut cache persistence fails.
results: Pre-commit validation passed: ruff check, ruff format, ty, pytest, TDD check, frontend supply-chain verification, typecheck, build, package.
Steam Deck push was skipped because the device was not reachable.
